figures.caption: Fig. 5: Prompt Design. Different models tend to have different biases when generating videos, which may lead to unnatural scenes, truncated bodies, moving cameras, or multiple people. We experimented extensively with prompt engineering to mitigate these model biases and obtain the most stable motions in the generated videos, which facilitates metric calculation. Best viewed when zoomed in.
